name: Broccoflower Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Bell pepper, red, seeded and chopped
1/2 Bell pepper, yellow, seeded and chopped
1 large Broccoflower bunch, cut into bite-sized florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok over medium-high heat or an electric skillet set to 350 degrees.
2. Add olive oil to the heated wok.
3. Stir in gingerroot, shallots, and garlic. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring constantly until the gingerroot and shallots are tender-crisp.
4. Add the red and yellow bell pepper pieces. Stir-fry for an additional minute.
5. Add the broccoflower florets. Continue stir-frying for 3 to 5 minutes or until the florets are tender.
6. Season the dish with Worcestershire sauce and ground pepper.
Per serving: about 45 calories, 2.5 grams protein, 7 grams carbohydrates, 1.4 grams fat, 25% of calories from fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 17 milligrams sodium.
